query: Gemma 3 模型為了減少長上下文推論時的 KV-cache 記憶體爆炸問題，將局部注意力層（local attention layers）的跨度設定為多少 token？
expected_answer: 1024 tokens。透過在每個全局層之間交錯多個局部層，並將局部層的跨度設為僅 1024 tokens，只有全局層會關注長上下文，從而減少 KV-cache 記憶體使用。
source_excerpt:
# Gemma 3 Technical Report

Gemma Team, Google DeepMind<sup>1</sup>

We introduce Gemma 3, a multimodal addition to the Gemma family of lightweight open models, ranging in scale from 1 to 27 billion parameters. This version introduces vision understanding abilities, a wider coverage of languages and longer context – at least 128K tokens. We also change the architecture of the model to reduce the KV-cache memory that tends to explode with long context. This is achieved by increasing the ratio of

query: Gemma 3 各模型版本（27B、12B、4B、1B）的預訓練 token 數量分別是多少？
expected_answer: Gemma 3 27B 使用 14T tokens，12B 版本使用 12T，4B 使用 4T，而 1B 則使用 2T tokens。
source_excerpt:
## 2.2. Pre-training

We follow a similar recipe as in Gemma 2 for pre-training with knowledge distillation.

Training data. We pre-train our models on a slightly larger token budget than Gemma 2, i.e., we train on 14T tokens for Gemma 3 27B, 12T for the 12B version, 4T for the 4B, and 2T tokens for the 1B. The increase in tokens accounts for the mix of images and text used during pretraining. We also increase the amount of multilingual data to improve language coverage. We add both monolingual

query: ShieldGemma 2 是什麼模型？它的參數量是多少，主要功能為何？
expected_answer: ShieldGemma 2 是一個使用 Gemma 3 建構的 4B 影像安全分類器，提供現成的影像安全解決方案，可輸出危險內容、色情及暴力類別的安全標籤。
source_excerpt: Figure 9 compares the memorization rates across Gemma and Gemini models; these models are ordered in reverse chronological order, with the newest Gemma 3 models on the left. We find that Gemma 3 models memorize long-form text at a much lower rate than prior models (note the log y-axis). We observe only a marginal diference in the memorization rates between the 4B, 12B, and 27B models, with 1B memorizing less than these larger models. Further, we find that a larger proportion of text is character

query: Gemma 3 模型在哪些方面進行了重點改進？
expected_answer: Gemma 3 版本專注於新增圖像理解與長上下文能力，同時改進多語言能力和 STEM 相關能力。
source_excerpt:
## 8. Discussion and Conclusion

In this work, we have presented Gemma 3, the latest addition to the Gemma family of open language models for text, image, and code. In this version, we focus on adding image understanding and long context while improving multilinguality and STEM-related abilities. Our model sizes and architectures are designed to be compatible with standard hardware, and most of our architecture improvements are tailored to fit this hardware while maintaining performance.

(2024) – only learning rate is swept, otherwise the same transfer settings are used. The results in Table 12 show that Gemma 3 excels at benchmarks involving document understanding, even outperforming the larger PaliGemma 2 variant. Note that due to average pooling in the vision encoder the Gemma 3 4B and 12B models are about 10x cheaper to transfer compared with the Pali

query: Docling 使用了哪些專用的 AI 模型來進行文件分析？
expected_answer: Docling 使用 DocLayNet 進行版面分析（layout analysis），以及 TableFormer 進行表格結構識別（table structure recognition）。
source_excerpt:
# Docling: An Efficient Open-Source Toolkit for AI-driven Document Conversion

Nikolaos Livathinos \*, Christoph Auer \*, Maksym Lysak, Ahmed Nassar, Michele Dolfi, Panagiotis Vagenas, Cesar Berrospi, Matteo Omenetti, Kasper Dinkla, Yusik Kim,   
Shubham Gupta, Rafael Teixeira de Lima, Valery Weber, Lucas Morin, Ingmar Meijer, Viktor Kuropiatnyk, Peter W. J. Staar

IBM Research, Ruschlikon, Switzerland¨ Please send correspondence to: deepsearch-core@zurich.ibm.com

## Abstract

We introduce Docl

query: Docling 的架構設計基於哪三個主要概念？
expected_answer: Pipelines、parser backends，以及作為核心的 DoclingDocument 資料模型。
source_excerpt: The most popular conversion tools today leverage visionlanguage models (VLMs), which process page images to text and markup directly. Among proprietary solutions, prominent examples include GPT-4o (OpenAI), Claude (Anthropic), and Gemini (Google). In the open-source domain, LLaVA-based models, such as LLaVA-next, are noteworthy. However, all generative AI-based models face two significant challenges. First, they are prone to hallucinations, i.e., their output may contain false information which

query: Docling支援哪些序列化格式？其中哪種格式可以無損保留所有元資訊，而哪些格式無法做到？
expected_answer: Docling支援JSON、Markdown和HTML等格式。其中只有JSON可以進行無損序列化（lossless serialization），能保留所有可用的元資訊；而Markdown和HTML屬於有損導出格式（lossy export formats），無法保留所有元資訊。
source_excerpt:
With this data model, Docling enables representing document content in a unified manner, i.e., regardless of the source document format.

Besides specifying the data model, the DoclingDocument class defines APIs encompassing document construction, inspection, and export. Using the respective methods, users can incrementally build a DoclingDocument, traverse its contents in reading order, or export to commonly used formats. Docling supports lossless serialization to (and deserialization from) JSO

query: 在效能比較部分，Docling 將其 PDF 轉換速度與哪三個開源解決方案進行對比？
expected_answer: Docling 將其轉換速度與 unstructured.io、Marker 和 MinerU 這三個開源解決方案進行比較。
source_excerpt:
## 4.1 AI Models

As part of Docling, we release two highly capable AI models to the open-source community, which have been developed and published recently by our team. The first model is a layout analysis model, an accurate object detector for page elements (Pfitzmann et al. 2022). The second model is TableFormer (Nassar et al. 2022; Lysak et al. 2023), a state-of-the-art table structure recognition model. We provide the pre-trained weights (hosted on Hugging Face) and a separate Python packag

query: 根據基準測試結果，在 Nvidia L4 GPU 上處理一頁文件的平均時間（中位數）是多少？
source_excerpt:
## 5.3 Benchmarking Methodology

We implemented several measures to enable a fair and reproducible benchmark across all tested assets. Specifically, the experimental setup accounts for the following factors:

• All assets are installed in the latest available versions, in a clean Python environment, and configured to use the state-of-the-art processing options and models, where applicable. We selectively disabled non-essential functionalities to achieve a compatible feature-set across all compar

query: 在 Docling 的效能測試中，關閉 OCR 功能後，x86 CPU、M3 Max SoC 和 L4 GPU 分別能節省多少運行時間？
expected_answer: 關閉 OCR 可節省 x86 CPU 和 M3 Max SoC 上 60% 的運行時間，以及 L4 GPU 上 50% 的運行時間。
source_excerpt:
Disabling OCR saves 60% of runtime on the x86 CPU and the M3 Max SoC, and 50% on the L4 GPU. Turning off table structure recognition saves 16% of runtime on the x86 CPU and the M3 Max SoC, and 24% on the L4 GPU. Disabling both OCR and table structure recognition saves around 75% of runtime on all system configurations.

query: Docling 未來計劃擴展哪些額外的模型類型來提升轉換品質？
expected_answer: Docling 計劃擴展 figure-classifier model（圖表分類模型）、equation-recognition model（方程式識別模型）和 code-recognition model（程式碼識別模型）。
source_excerpt:
Docling is also available and officially maintained as a system package in the Red Hat<sup>®</sup> Enterprise Linux<sup>®</sup> AI (RHEL AI) distribution, which seamlessly allows to develop, test, and run the Granite family of large language models for enterprise applications.
